div.h1: Column vs Row Parallel Matrix Multiplication
div.h3: Technical Implementation Spec for Tensor Model Parallelism (TP)

g.text: MODULE A: Column Parallel Linear Layer (Y = [XW₀, XW₁])
MODULE B: Row Parallel Linear Layer (Y = Σ(XᵢWᵢ))

div.p: This sequence allows sharded tensors to flow through activations, delaying the expensive All-Reduce until the very end of the MLP block.
